positive: Stylized central composition illustration of a whimsical forest scene, featuring anthropomorphic glowing mushrooms and playful forest animals like raccoons and squirrels, all interconnected by bioluminescent roots and delicate ivy. The aesthetic is highly detailed, utilizing negative space and strong, clean silhouettes reminiscent of Art Nouveau stained glass meets modern nature illustration. Color palette should feature deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, warm amber accents, and touches of iridescent purple. Strong chiaroscuro lighting, as if viewed at twilight, giving the subjects a mystical, glowing aura. Perfect for repeating apparel print. Vector style, minimalist lines, high contrast, 8k quality.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, signature, watermark, text, logo, low resolution, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, oversaturated, poor composition
